content.en:
The Eternal Dao Body not only has a grade division, but also has four realms: entry, small success, great completion, and consummation.

It is rumored that the Eternal Dao Body of the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom has reached the realm of Dacheng, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

"I have to deduce the Eternal Dao Seed, even the top forces only have the second-class Eternal Dao Seed inheritance, even if I join those top forces, it is impossible to obtain the Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance, and now I can only rely on this Eternal Origin Treasure Ruins Japanese Yuan Disc. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian began to use the Sun Disc to deduce the Eternal Dao Species.

Of course, if you want to deduce the Eternal Dao species, you must at least have a little understanding, if you start from scratch, the difficulty will definitely be almost against the sky, and the success rate is almost zero.

In order to collect a little bit of information about the Eternal Dao species, he continued to synthesize items of the high-level Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules to trade with the chambers of commerce under the command of the top forces in exchange for a little bit of information.

Those materials are naturally not the Eternal Dao Species, but there are a little bit of words and incomplete information about the Eternal Dao Species, which seems to be understood, but in fact has no substance at all.

But even then, the value of this information is incomparably high.

One piece of information!

Two documents!

Ten documents!

Gradually, Ye Tian obtained a lot of information about the Eternal Dao Species, and he also had enough understanding of the Eternal Dao Species.

Of course, relying on these materials, it is impossible to create the Eternal Dao Species, but after he understands it, he can use the Ruin Sun Disc to deduce the Eternal Dao Species, and he has a clear direction.

"Start deducing!"

Ye Tian used the Disc of the Sun in the Ruins, the eternal sequence of the Ten Perfection Realm to the Dao Rules, and carried out continuous deduction.

However, until this replica body was scrapped, there was not much to achieve.

"It looks like it's going to take a long time to deduce!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, the Sunrise Disc is only a glimmer of hope for the launch of the Eternal Dao Species, and it is impossible to deduce it all at once.

If it was deduced all at once, the ruin disk would not have fallen into his hands.

Before you know it, the 10 million years of the Dao Era have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian could only say that he had slightly deduced something, but he was still far from truly deducing the Eternal Dao Species.

"At least you have to take the 100 million Dao Era as a unit to be able to deduce the Eternal Dao Species, no wonder those Eternal Dao Realms are not interested in this thing, there must be many top forces who have had the Ruin Sun Disk, but after trying for endless years, they couldn't succeed, but instead made a large number of Eternal Dao powerhouses or the foundation of the Eternal Dao Realm seriously damaged, so they gave up completely!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Luoxia Court.

Xinghai is out of the customs this time, and his injuries have all recovered.

"Grandfather, have you recovered from your injuries?"

Luo Wushuang asked.

"It's recovered!" Xinghai smiled, and immediately a powerful aura was transmitted from his body, and there was no problem at all.

"Great!"

Luo Wushuang said excitedly.

However, Xing Hai still frowned and said: "In order to heal my injuries, the wealth of Luoxia Pavilion has dropped sharply now, and we still can't solve the trouble, there are still many forces that covet the remaining wealth of Luoxia Pavilion, unless I break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, I can only solve the trouble!"

Eternal to the Dao realm!

Luo Wushuang didn't think that his maternal grandfather would be able to break through successfully, if it was so easy to break through and succeed, Xinghai would have broken through a long time ago.

Even if you break through many times, you can't break through successfully, so you have been in the realm of eternity to the late stage of Taoism!

"I'll try to break through again, if the breakthrough fails, I have to find a backer!"

Penal Haido.

"Backer, who are you looking for? Lord Roselle, but we don't have anything to interest the Lord of Roselle, it's not bad for him to maintain order in Roselle City, and it's not bad for people to attack us, it's impossible to take care of our industry!"

Xing Hai suddenly became mysterious, "Actually, your father still left one thing, which should be able to allow the top forces to protect us, but I don't recommend looking for the Luo Shen City Lord, although the Luo Shen City Lord is also an Eternal Dao Realm, but it is only an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm early stage, and it can't really be our backer." "

"My father left something, what is it?"

Luo Wushuang was curious.

Xing Hai took Luo Wushuang to a treasure trove in the headquarters of Luo Xia Pavilion, this treasure house was very hidden, and there were not many things.

Xing Hai took out a treasure from inside, and it was a token.

"The token of Jiuhu Mountain, this token can make people go to Jiuhu Mountain!"

Penal Haido.

"What, it turned out to be the token of Jiuhu Mountain!!! Luo Wushuang was shocked, "It is said that Jiuhu Mountain is a place where top forces are assessed, and that force uses Jiuhu Mountain as a place for assessment, once you pass the assessment, you can join them." That force is still extremely powerful, and there is not much binding force, and there are only benefits to joining, and there is no harm in joining. But it would take a long time for that force to give away some Nine Lakes Mountain Tokens, and many Eternal Dao Realms wanted to obtain a Nine Lakes Mountain Token. With one token, you can try to enter Jiuhu Mountain nine times!"

"This token can be used three times!" Xing Hai said: "Your father used it once, but unfortunately failed the assessment. If you succeed in the assessment and join that force, even if your father falls, the other party will protect Luo Xia Pavilion for a long time. Originally, I kept this token for you to use in the future, but now it seems that it will be difficult to keep!"

"Grandfather, this Nine Lakes Mountain token is too precious, I think it's better not to trade it as much as possible, unless it is a real desperate situation. And Ye Tian is still in our Luoxia Pavilion, as long as there is no Eternal Dao Realm against us, it is not too bad. Luo Wushuang said.

At the mention of Ye Tian, Xing Hai frowned slightly and said: "Ye Tian, he is too mysterious, we don't know him very well, and he is obviously only temporarily living in Luoxia Pavilion, and we have no contract with him now, so we can't rely on him completely!"

"I understand, but if you don't decide, don't take out the Nine Lakes Mountain Token!"

Luo Wushuang said.

"Okay!" Xing Hai replied, "Maybe I have a chance to break through!"

......

The years passed.

More than 20 million years have passed in the Dao Era, and Ye Tian has used the Xuri Disc to deduce some more results, at least he really sees hope.

And over the years, his cultivation has also improved a little, but he is still in the early stage of the Eternal Dao Realm, and he is still far away from the middle stage of the Eternal Dao Realm.

Other than that.

His wife, sons, and daughters also comprehended the rules of the Eternal Sequence Dao with his help, and they all stepped into the realm of the late stage of the Eternal Dao.
